commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=5980986570c8e211bc833dcf9bae3d50c1f1d06e)
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds a Crabbox skill, Crabbox configuration, a workflow-dispatch hydrate workflow, actionlint runner labels, and CODEOWNERS coverage for the new automation files.

Reproducibility: not applicable. this is a repository automation setup PR, not a bug report. Source inspection is enough to compare the proposed Crabbox lane against current main’s Swift/macOS CI and documentation contract.
commands.review_followup: A maintainer needs to choose the intended CrawlBar Crabbox proof target before an automated repair would be safe.

target.title: chore: add constrained Crabbox setup
target.body:
## Summary

- Adds the exact Crabbox skill copied from `openclaw/openclaw`.
- Adds constrained Crabbox config and hydrate workflow with repo-specific self-hosted runner labels.
- Adds actionlint runner-label config and CODEOWNERS coverage for the new automation surfaces.

This is the narrowed replacement shape for the earlier broad setup baseline. It intentionally does not add CodeQL, stale automation, licensing changes, Dependabot, package-manager files, or unrelated policy defaults.

## Verification

- `git diff --check`
- Ruby YAML parse for `.crabbox.yaml`, `.github/actionlint.yaml`, and `.github/workflows/crabbox-hydrate.yml`
- `actionlint -config-file .github/actionlint.yaml .github/workflows/crabbox-hydrate.yml`
- Crabbox skill SHA-256 matched `openclaw/openclaw`: `ed512c0b0385fae7f6c5c14a7e9e6236ab68936506687a99ca976873492bdc43`
- Private-path scan for new public workflow/config files
- `swift build`
- `swift run crawlbar-selftest`

## Notes

No live Crabbox lease was started for this setup-only patch.
target.author: vincentkoc

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
